div1.entryFree: Uncovered, not covered, open, bare: with public accusation, u. slander, unmitigated rancour, Ado IV, 1, 307. stand u. to the vulgar groom, H6B IV, 1, 128 (bare-headed). in thy best robes u. on the bier thou shalt be borne, Rom. IV, 1, 110 (cf. Hml. IV, 5, 164: they bore him barefaced on the bier). to answer with thy u. body this extremity of the skies, Lr. III, 4, 106 (unclothed, naked).
